title: Navigate to Cloud Provider Observability for Azure

blocks.content:
In this milestone, you'll access the Cloud Provider Observability Azure configuration interface in Grafana Cloud.

This interface provides the central location for managing your Azure monitoring setup, including authentication, resource discovery, and dashboard deployment.

To navigate to the Cloud Provider Observability Azure configuration interface, complete the following steps:

blocks.title: Navigate to the Azure configuration interface

blocks.content: On the Grafana Cloud home page, open the navigation menu and click **Observability > Cloud provider > Azure**.
On the **Azure** page, click the **Configuration** tab.
Click **Serverless** to select the serverless configuration method.
Click **Add new credential** to begin configuring your Azure connection.

The Cloud Provider Observability Azure configuration page guides you through connecting your Azure account and selecting which resources to monitor.

In your next milestone, you'll create the required Azure service principal that allows Grafana Cloud to access your Azure metrics.
